creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for reporting this issue! 

I had changed a "case" to an "if" after testing, and forgot to remove the ";;" that was require for the case command and a syntax error without ...

Sorry for mis-attributing the report to bsd@dino.sk only - I had not opened the PR but only seen the mail for comment #2 when I committed the fix.
